englishDefinitions: An exaggerated sound used to show speechlessness, confusion, or being attracted to someone.
A comic expression of being unable to speak clearly.
persianTranslation: واکنشِ شوخی‌آمیزِ از شدت هول‌زدگی یا جذب شدن
examples: When she walked in, he just said, 'Hummina hummina hummina.'
The cartoon character made a hummina hummina hummina sound after seeing the cake.
He was so nervous that all he could say was 'hummina hummina hummina.'
